title: Vibranium
description: Vibranium with new tools, weapons and armor (including wolf armor), as well as a powerful 3x3 mining tool (Vibranium Mace) and an improved shield!
body:
Welcome to **Vibranium**! This mod introduces a powerful new resource line designed to feel like a natural expansion to vanilla progression. Find rare geodes, upgrade your equipment, and unlock unique tools and effects that will completely change how you explore and fight. ![Items and Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a923aa7582533f6da6021ab9cabe38165db747d.png) ### ✨ Features at a Glance * **Vibranium Gear:** Craft highly durable armor, swords, and tools. To upgrade your gear, you will need the **Vibranium Upgrade Smithing Template**, which can be found in *Trial Chambers*. * **Specialized Weaponry:** * **Vibranium Mace:** Mines blocks in a **3x3 area** (hold Shift to mine normally). The push effect also deals damage to enemies caught in the blast! * **Vibranium Shield:** Reliably blocks melee attacks and **reflects arrows** back at your enemies. * **Companion Protection:** Safeguard your loyal companions with specialized Vibranium **Wolf Armor** and **Horse Armor** (plus a Turtle Helmet variant for yourself!). * **Worldgen & Nature:** * Explore stunning **Vibranium Geodes** deep underground. * Discover the new **Soulwood** biome flavor, complete with a full wood and decoration set. * Use **Enriched Vibranium Dirt/Farmland** to drastically boost your crop growth speed. * **Kinetic Redistribution:** Find the **Heart Shaped Herb** to brew powerful Elixirs. When damaged, your stored energy pushes nearby enemies back and deals damage. The Elixir also grants Speed, Regeneration, Absorption, and a Damage Boost! --- ### 📸 Gallery & Crafting
Click here to see Armor, Structures, Tools & more! **Structures & Blocks** ![Vibranium Geode Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd41009345f17c9644f03dc63c929eb207208554_0.webp) ![Soul Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b10a03e1848d00412987404e30fd8624f1c5fc26_0.webp) **Companion Armor** ![Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db40906b9d7b5789b217317ed5b8eb11c0c7ee4.png) ![Wolf Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4631a2112ae467762b9d14372cc30161c2d05760_0.webp) **Crafting & Recipe Previews** ![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/397a5106cf1b56133772c21a53e5ff0eaf532dcd.gif) ![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78bbc3b418470791b58b98838694d8b4a589aaca.gif) ![Adv_Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e834123d8b3f70f8f9b92b753f106825a0a8851.gif) ![Other_Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2133ed63028a8e50968f0beeaf6565274196e1e6.gif) ![Brewing_Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c382acc107050101c216205a4197847cedc15e08.gif)
--- **⚠️ Note on the Vibra Golem:** The Golem is currently in the prototype/alpha phase and does not yet spawn naturally in the world. Full functionality will be included in future updates! 📢 **Found a bug or have a suggestion?** Please report issues to our [Issue Tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/BigBull-H3RO/Vibranium/issues).
